site.name: Level Up
site.slogan: Level up your skills, one level at a time

hero.title: Level up your skills, one level at a time
hero.subtitle: Professional training in cybersecurity and IT. Expert content, structured progression, recognized certifications.

reason1.title: Expert content
reason1.desc: Training designed by active professionals in the cybersecurity field

reason2.title: Structured progression
reason2.desc: Pedagogical paths in 3 levels for a progressive skill development

reason3.title: Certifications
reason3.desc: Digital badges and certificates at every step of your journey

lvl1.name: Level 1 - Introduction
lvl1.desc: Cybersecurity fundamentals and first technical steps

lvl2.name: Level 2 - Proficiency
lvl2.desc: Advanced techniques and hands-on practice on real environments

lvl3.name: Level 3 - Expertise
lvl3.desc: Complex operations, professional auditing and specialization

t1.quote: A complete training that allowed me to switch careers to cybersecurity.
t1.author: Career-changing developer

t2.quote: The modular format is perfect for learning at my own pace after work.
t2.author: System administrator

t3.quote: The practical exercises are very close to real situations encountered in the field.

about.title: About Level Up
about.story: Level Up is a training platform dedicated to cybersecurity and IT. We believe learning should be progressive, practical, and rewarding.

values.title: Our values
values.excellenceDesc: Up-to-date content with the latest technologies and methods in the industry
values.accessibilityDesc: Training adapted to all levels, from beginner to expert
values.communityDesc: An ecosystem of passionate learners and professionals
